name: bios-flash
description: Use this skill for flash BIOS, burn BIOS, program BIOS, update BIOS, upgrade BIOS, update firmware, or similar flash/update requests.
system_prompt:
BIOS Flash Skill: flash or update BIOS.

1. Run fs_map to list volumes. Find AfuEfix64.efi by calling fs_ls(volume="fsN", path="") on each root; use the first matching volume. If missing, ask the user to upload AfuEfix64.efi and the ROM, then stop.
2. If a local ROM path is given, upload it with upload_file_tcp(localPath=<path>, volume="fs<N>", uefiPath="\<filename>"). Keep the filename at root; do not rename or place in a subdirectory. Verify with fs_ls. Otherwise use an on-device ROM.
3. ROM_FILENAME = uploaded file, else any .ROM/.AA\d+ file in root. If none exists, ask the user to upload a ROM and stop.
4. Flash with shell_exec(command="fs<N>:\AfuEfix64.efi <ROM_FILENAME> /p /b /n /x", fs_index=N, timeout_sec=600). Wait for full completion; never abort.
5. SUCCESS requires ExitCode Success plus AFU progress evidence such as Flashing/Verifying/100%. Otherwise report output and cause, then stop without reboot.
6. On success, reboot, wait 30 seconds, ping once, and repeat until PONG or about 15 minutes timeout.

RULES: no rename/subdirectory; never retry a flash because it can corrupt BIOS; never reboot on failed or uncertain flash; keep `/p /b /n /x` unless the user asks otherwise.
